# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    
    N = int(data[0])
    T = int(data[1])
    A = list(map(int, data[2:2+T]))
    
    marked = set()
    row_count = [0] * N
    col_count = [0] * N
    diag1_count = 0
    diag2_count = 0
    
    for turn in range(T):
        num = A[turn]
        i = (num - 1) // N
        j = (num - 1) % N
        
        if (i, j) in marked:
            continue
        
        marked.add((i, j))
        row_count[i] += 1
        col_count[j] += 1
        
        if i == j:
            diag1_count += 1
        if i + j == N - 1:
            diag2_count += 1
        
        if row_count[i] == N or col_count[j] == N or diag1_count == N or diag2_count == N:
            print(turn + 1)
            return
    
    print(-1)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
